auto_transfer_hustles.name: Crypto Payment Gateway
auto_transfer_hustles.description: Accept crypto payments for any product/service, auto-forward to wallet
how_it_works: Customer pays crypto → Payment gateway → Auto-forward to your wallet
Supports BTC, ETH, BNB, USDT, USDC, TRX
needs: NowPayments API key (free) OR CoinGate API key (free)

auto_transfer_hustles.name: Crypto Affiliate Programs
auto_transfer_hustles.description: Refer users to crypto services, earn commission paid directly to wallet
how_it_works: Users sign up and trade/use service

auto_transfer_hustles.name: Smart Contract Auto-Distribution
auto_transfer_hustles.description: Revenue goes to smart contract, auto-distributes to wallet
how_it_works: Used for token sales, NFT mints
needs: BSC wallet private key (for deployment only)

auto_transfer_hustles.name: DeFi Yield Harvester
auto_transfer_hustles.description: Auto-compound yields and transfer profits to wallet
how_it_works: Transfer profits to wallet on schedule

auto_transfer_hustles.name: Telegram Paid Services
auto_transfer_hustles.description: Sell premium Telegram services, accept crypto direct to wallet
how_it_works: User sends crypto to your wallet
Funds already in wallet - no transfer needed

auto_transfer_hustles.name: Airdrop Hunter
auto_transfer_hustles.description: Auto-participate in airdrops, tokens sent directly to wallet

direct_to_wallet.description: Payments go directly to your wallet - no transfer needed

smart_contract_auto.description: Smart contract auto-distributes to your wallet

scheduled_withdrawal.description: KAI auto-withdraws from exchanges on schedule
